entity.summary: Linea decentralized exchange and concentrated-liquidity protocol supporting token swaps, classic and concentrated pools, liquidity staking, gauges, voting, incentives, and trader-focused routing infrastructure.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies NILE as an active Linea liquidity layer and decentralized exchange. It documents swaps, voting, incentives, vesting, LP staking, concentrated liquidity, gauges, a public dApp, and deployed Linea contracts. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: What is NILE?
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies NILE as a Linea concentrated-liquidity layer designed for liquidity providers and traders and links its DEX functionality and application resources.

evidence.title: NILE deployed contract addresses
evidence.notes: First-party contract registry publishes current Linea pair factories, routers, concentrated-liquidity factories, position manager, swap router, quoters, gauges, rewards, voting, incentives, and related contracts.
